---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement you want.

## Problem

What user problem does this solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the behavior, flow, or UX you would like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternatives or workarounds you thought about.

## Additional Context

Add sketches, screenshots, references, or implementation notes if helpful.
